creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
netperf now has a diff.gz file, but for this file no checksum has
been recorded into files/md5. So you get an error about the missing
checksum for netperf-21pl3-20000721.diff.gz

Fix: 

Simply generate a new md5 file and put it into CVS ? :-). I have not
checked if the port builds.
How-To-Repeat: Try a make checksum in ports/benchmark/netperf.
